title: Neeha Nagpal launches N & Company Legal
description: Neeha Nagpal and Vishvendra Tomar have founded N & Company Legal, a full-service commercial litigation firm based in Jor Bagh, New Delhi, with a presence in Mumbai. Nagpal leads the firm as Founding and Managing Partner, with Tomar as Partner. Built around a focused practice in White-Collar Crime defence, PMLA, Arbitration, Insolvency and Bankruptcy and IPR, the firm appears before the Supreme Court, High Courts, NCLT, NCLAT, the PMLA Appellate Tribunal and key regulatory
